race.description: Lone Pine Charge 20 April Maiden Plate
race.comment: THINK BACK (14) has produced two strong efforts over 1280m at this track since returning from a spell, leading for home on each occasion. Less pressure up front over today's journey which will make her a bit tougher to run down. FORTHEO (1) has come back in career-best form this prep, filling a couple of minor placings over shorter trips. Gets a few key gear changes today and needs this sort of trip. Likely to be there at the finish. The lightly raced KENISIS (10) is coming along nicely and is in the mix but needs luck from a sticky gate. CAPTAINTHUNDERBOLT (3) drew poorly but did a great job to finish third on debut at Dubbo three weeks ago. Can play a major role out to this more suitable distance.
